zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Grathney於大約1118年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安時，她的父親Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar37歲，母親Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar28歲。她於1134年之前與Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Grathney于大约1118年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安时，她的父亲Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar37岁，母亲Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar28岁。她于1134年之前与Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林。

nameMeanings.name: Grathney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Grathney was born about 1118, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar, was 37 and her mother, Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar, was 28. She married Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn before 1134, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Grathney est née environ 1118, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn avant 1134, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Grathney um 1118 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar 37 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar 28. Sie hat vor 1134 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb in Roslin, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Grathney è nata il circa 1118 nel East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn prima del 1134, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Grathneyが約1118年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンで生まれた時，父Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Marは37歳，母Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Marは28歳であった。1134年以前にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンでHenry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Grathney(이)가 대략 1118년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1134년 이전 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Grathney nasceu aproximadamente 1118, em East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn antes 1134, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em Roslin, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Grathney родилась около 1118 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn перед 1134 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Grathney nació aproximadamente 1118, en East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Mormaer Gillocher Chlerig Roderick de Grathenay of Mar, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mrs. Grathney Mormaer de Mar, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn antes de 1134, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en Roslin, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
